title: Solis Apartment - Scene Fixture
global_constraints: Three structural beats: Entry (180-230 words), Journals (260-330 words), A&S Mug (260-330 words).
Do not prove Solis is flesh and blood.
Do not let Kain deduce what A&S means.
Do not mention Kain's ICS readings.
Use Kain's clinical, proprioceptive observation style.
Adhere strictly to the All-in-One Banned Items List for prose filtering (no 'vibrant', 'delve', rule of three lists, or direct emotional crutches).

beats.label: The Entry
beats.outline: Kain executes an off-book infiltration into Solis's apartment. He registers the room geometry and security baseline.
required_facts: Solis is absent or residue only.
Living-room analysis must be limited to one or two details only.
Kain must reach the study by the end of Beat 1.
pov_constraints: Kain cannot know Solis's true nature.
Kain does not speculate about N.K. or Alain Aspect.

beats.label: The Journals
beats.outline: Kain locates the records of the early insertion trials in the study. Subject 7 appears in the records.
required_facts: Subject 7 must appear in the records.
The insertion trials must become the main revelation.
Avoid lingering on generic shelf/journal counting.
No line confirms Solis has a living body.
pov_constraints: Kain does not convert observation into final explanation.

beats.label: The A&S Mug
beats.outline: Kain spots the deep blue mug with gold A&S lettering after examining the Subject 7 records. He extracts concrete data and exits.
required_facts: The A&S mug appears after Subject 7, not before.
Kain extracts one concrete data point: a date, subject number, or photographed page.
End on the apartment feeling staged/assembled, not on an explanation.
pov_constraints: Kain may register the mug as anomalous.
Kain must not conclude that A&S means Alain and Solis.
Kain exits without leaving a trace.
